description_wiki: Liberty Island is a federally owned island in Upper New York Bay in the northeastern United States.

description_wiki: The Empire State Building is a 102-story, supertall skyscraper in the Midtown South neighborhood of Manhattan, New York City, United States.

aliases: The Statue of Liberty Enlightening the World
description: American icon in New York, United States
description_wiki: The Statue of Liberty (Liberty Enlightening the World; French: La Liberté éclairant le monde) is a colossal neoclassical sculpture of a robed and crowned woman on Liberty Island in New York Harbor, within New York City.

description: southernmost part of the island of Manhattan in New York City, United States
description_wiki: Lower Manhattan, also known as Downtown Manhattan, is the southernmost part of the New York City borough of Manhattan.

aliases: Staten Island borough, New York City
description: borough of New York City, New York, United States of America
description_wiki: Staten Island  ( STAT-ən) is the southernmost of the five boroughs of New York City, coextensive with Richmond County and situated at the southernmost point of the State of New York.

description: state of the United States of America
description_wiki: New Jersey is a state located in both the Mid-Atlantic and Northeastern regions of the United States.

description: international airport in Newark, New Jersey
description_wiki: Newark Liberty International Airport (IATA: EWR, ICAO: KEWR, FAA LID: EWR) is a major international airport in the U.S. state of New Jersey, serving the New York metropolitan area.

description: airport in Queens, New York City
description_wiki: LaGuardia Airport (IATA: LGA, ICAO: KLGA, FAA LID: LGA), colloquially known as LaGuardia or LGA, is a civil airport in the East Elmhurst neighborhood of Queens in New York City, United States, situated on the northwestern shore of Long Island, bordering Flushing Bay.

description: international airport in New York, United States
description_wiki: John F. Kennedy International Airport (IATA: JFK, ICAO: KJFK, FAA LID: JFK) is a major international airport serving the New York metropolitan area.

description_wiki: The September 11 attacks, colloquially known as 9/11, were a coordinated series of suicide attacks perpetrated by the Islamist terrorist organization al-Qaeda against the United States in 2001.
